study_group_representative.quote: In South Africa, approximately 28 000 community healthcare workers (CHCWs) have been deployed. By the end of April 2020, more than 6 million people had been screened and 42 000 referred for testing.

intervention_and_participants_defined.quote: In South Africa, approximately 28 000 community healthcare workers (CHCWs) have been deployed. By the end of April 2020, more than 6 million people had been screened and 42 000 referred for testing.

outcome_assessed_for_60pct.quote: Sixteen percent of those screened were referred for testing at health facilities (range, 4%– 48% by subdistrict).

follow_up_length_reported.quote: Figure 1. Coronavirus disease 2019 community screening by subdistrict in Cape Town, South Africa, 4 April 2020 to 22 May 2020.

outcome_assessors_blinded.quote: Of note, screening is done mainly by doctors and other CHCWs.

outcome_definition_objective_precise.quote: Globally, the current gold standard test for SARS-CoV-2 infection is detection of viral RNA in a sample from the respiratory tract by reverse transcriptase polymerase chain reaction

important_prognostic_factors_accounted_f.quote: Fortunately, most of the cases were young and asymptomatic, and 104 recovered.

analysis_described_and_effect_quantified.quote: By the end of April 2020, more than 6 million people had been screened and 42 000 referred for testing.
